daily.today_energy: Your magnetic presence is hitting different today. The cosmos is basically giving you permission to take up space and let your light do the talking. Channel that golden energy into whatever matters most.
daily.love: Someone's noticing the shift in your vibe. Whether you're single or coupled up, vulnerability is your superpower rn. Real connections happen when you drop the performance and just... exist.
daily.career: Your ideas have legs today. Trust that instinct telling you to speak up in that meeting or pitch that thing you've been sitting on. The universe is backing your bold moves right now.
daily.health: Your body's asking for movement that actually feels good—not punishment disguised as wellness. Dance, walk, stretch, whatever brings joy. Your nervous system's vibing with ease today.

weekly.overview: Your energy's hitting different this week, Leo. Mars is pushing you toward authenticity and meaningful connections. Trust your gut when it whispers—it's basically your internal GPS right now. Time to shed what no longer serves.
weekly.love: Someone might be trying to catch your attention, but vibe-check first. If it feels forced, it probably is. Your magnetism is strongest when you're genuinely being yourself, not performing. Real ones recognize real ones.
weekly.career: There's momentum building behind the scenes. Speak up about your ideas—people are actually listening. Channel that Leo confidence into showing up differently. Small shifts in how you communicate could open unexpected doors.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for more intentional movement and rest, not punishment. Listen to what feels nourishing rather than obligatory. Creative activities could boost your overall energy more than you'd expect.
